titleStmt.title: SII 8.750: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 750. (A.R. No. 434 of 1903). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . taṇṭecuraṉ Olai . tāparañcūḻ vaiyyakattu kaṇṭicaṉ karumam Ārāyka paṇṭe Aṟañceytāṉ ceytāṉ Aṟaṅkāttāṉ pātam tiṟampāmal
ceṉṉimel vaittu . Aruḷāṟ Ātitaṇṭīcuraṉ tevakaṉmi koyilkaṇakkarom muṉṉāḷ turukkar vantu tiruvācalkaḷum niraiyal kulaintu tecamum Aḻintu kiṭakkaiyiṟ
sakalalokaśakra vatti veṉṟumaṇkoṇṭa campuvarāyarkku yāṇṭu patiṉālāvatu tiruvāmāttūr Uṭaiyār Aḻakiyanāyaṉār koyil pāracivaril cirupparamuṭai
yār makaṉ Ayyuṟatittāṉ pallavarāyar Iūr tampirāṉārai cevittu niṟkkaiyil Ittiruvācalukku Uriya maṉitakaḷ kottukkaḷ pala celkaiyil
ya tampirāṉārkku viṇṇappañceytu tirumukam vāṅki pala� t tāṉikaraiyum kuvittu Uṭaiyār tiruvakampaṭiyil Uḷḷa maṉitakaḷaiyum kuvittu kottukku veṇṭum pala
kottil Uḷḷavarkaḷaiyum kuvittu tampirāṉār tirumuṉpāka kāṭṭi tiruvācalai nokki Aḻiyaveṇṭumavaiyum Aḻintu Inta nāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇi tevamaṇṭalam muṉ
naṭantapaṭi tirumukamum vāṅki Ippaṭi Ittiruvācalukku veṇṭum nilappāṭu ceytapaṭiyāle Ivarkku kāṇiāṭciyāka Aruḷicceyalpaṭi kuṭutta maṇṭapakkottukku cāmutā
yanilai kāṇi Āṭciyāka naṭattikkoḷḷakkaṭavarākavum . Innilaikku Aḻakiyatevapperunteruvil teṉciṟakil melpāṟkellai kaṇṇuṭaiyaperumāḷ kaṭṭiirunta maṉaikku kiḻa
kkum kiḻpāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār maṉaikku meṟkkum maṉaikkolāl(āl) maṉai mukkolum Ivarkku Ilakkaikku nāḷ Oṉṟukku tūṇi nellu koyilil peṟu
m coṟu nāṉāḻikku nellu kuṟuṇi Irunāḻi nikki niṉṟa nellukku kār pacāṉam Uṭpaṭa Aṭaitta tiruveṇkāṭi Uḷḷiṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭumā
muṉtirikaiyum koyilil peṟum coṟum maṉai kol mukkolum kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu cantirātittavarai naṭattikoḷvate
Aruḷāl Ātitaṇṭīcuratevakaṉmi koyilkaṇakkarom . Ivai koyilkaṇakku viṭuruṭaiyāṉ kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu . Aḻakiya tevapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . Ivai poṟkoyilnampi Uttarāpa
tiṉāyakaṉ Aṉantatevaṉ Eḻuttu . Ekāmparapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu . tiruttoṇṭa nampi Eḻuttu . Ivai vittakattevar Eḻuttu . tiruvuṇāyakar Eḻuttu . Ivai veṭaniṉṟār Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 8.750 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
